strengths: Demonstrated consistent bilateral instrument control throughout the attempt
Maintained steady camera positioning and workspace organization
weaknesses: Failed to complete all six transfers within the 5-minute time limit
Appears to have encountered difficulty with final transfer sequences
Time management insufficient for advanced-level expectations

drills.name: Speed ladder progression
drills.description: Complete full six-transfer sequences with decreasing time targets: 4 minutes, 3 minutes, then 2 minutes.
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to complete all six transfers within the time limit.

drills.name: Final transfer rehearsal
drills.description: Practice only the last two transfers repeatedly, focusing on efficient pickup and release mechanics.

drills.name: Economy-of-motion ladder
drills.description: Perform complete task sequences slowly with minimal wasted regrasping and instrument repositioning.
drills.targets_weakness: Time management insufficient for advanced-level expectations.

progression_note: At the advanced level, consistent sub-2-minute completion times are expected. Focus on eliminating any hesitation in the transfer sequence and achieving the published benchmark of 48 seconds.
